positive: A majestic, stylized howling wolf silhouette standing against a vibrant, cosmic nebula background. The wolf should be rendered in deep indigo and charcoal black, with sharp, elegant lines. The nebula features swirls of electric teal, glowing magenta, and deep sapphire blue, suggesting distant stardust and galaxies. Focus on high contrast and clean outlines. The composition should be centered, making the wolf the dominant, heroic figure. Artistic style should blend modern graphic design with cosmic realism, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Incorporate subtle ethereal glow effects around the silhouette edges. Minimalist background focus, maximal contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, grunge, amateur, noise, excessive detail, signature
